destinations.title: Discover the Soul of the Maghreb
destinations.description: From the hidden riads of Marrakesh to the azure streets of Chefchaouen, explore our hand-picked collection of Morocco's most iconic cities.
destinations.fallbackDescription: Immerse yourself in the rich culture, stunning architecture, and vibrant life of this majestic destination.

destinationDetail.emptyPicks: Fresh picks are being curated for this city.
destinationDetail.introTitle: A city guide shaped around texture, taste, and a sense of place.
destinationDetail.introDescription: Use this guide as a refined starting point for {{city}}: pair slow cultural wandering with intimate dining rooms, considered cafes, and stays that keep you close to the city's most memorable rhythms.
destinationDetail.nextStopDescription: Two focused paths for the parts of the journey travelers book, revisit, and recommend: where to eat, and where to stay.
destinationDetail.diningDescription: From atmospheric cafes to polished dining rooms, follow the flavors that give {{city}} its daily tempo.
destinationDetail.staysDescription: Pick stays with character, comfort, and a strong sense of place, from calm riads to refined city hotels.

stays.title: Places to stay with character and calm.
stays.description: Browse riads, boutique hotels, and refined Moroccan stays chosen for atmosphere, comfort, and a stronger sense of place.
stays.emptyDescription: Try a different city or a broader search term{{queryPart}}{{cityPart}}.

detail.title: A calm base for discovering {{city}}.
detail.paragraphOne: {{name}} brings together the comfort of a considered stay with the texture of its local setting. It is a refined place to pause between long walks, market visits, dining plans, and the slower moments that make travel memorable.
detail.paragraphTwo: The experience is shaped around atmosphere, useful location, and easy access to the rhythms of {{city}}. Use it as a settled home base while exploring nearby streets, cultural stops, and restaurants across the city.
detail.whyLocationText: A practical base for exploring {{city}}, with the address clearly available for planning arrivals and routes.
detail.whyTravelText: Useful for travelers who want comfort, atmosphere, and an easier transition between city discovery and downtime.
detail.whyEaseText: A stay profile designed around the essentials guests expect while planning a smooth Moroccan itinerary.
detail.essentialsDescription: Key details for planning your arrival at {{name}}.
detail.availabilityNote: Availability and rates should be confirmed before booking.
